'''''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Jedi Power Battles'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide''' is a video game strategy guide written by [[Alex Neuse]] and published by [[Prima Games]] in [[March]] [[2000]]. The guide contains 94-pages filled with nearly every detail of the game, and eight sealed pages of unlockable secrets.

==Publisher's summary==
'''LEARN the moves.'''

'''EARN the FORCE''.'
*Battle tactics for each of the five Jedi Knights
*Tips on unlocking new moves and strengthening the Force
*Walkthroughs and maps of all ten action-packed levels
*Moves lists for all five Jedi
*Covers single-player and cooperative modes
*Written by the LEAD TESTER of ''Jedi Power Battles''

==Contents==
===Gameplay Strategies===
*Lock-On Mode
*Items and Power-Ups

===Character Profiles===
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]
*[[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]]
*[[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]]
